deals.deal: Free Medium Fries Every Friday + National Fry Day Bonus (July 10)
deals.desc: Get a free medium fries with any $1+ app purchase every Friday all year; on July 10 (National French Fry Day) rewards members get an extra free medium fries offer.

deals.deal: Cow Appreciation Day — Free Entrée (July 14)
deals.desc: Dress like a cow and score a completely free entrée—breakfast, lunch, or dinner options available—in-restaurant only on July 14, 2026 from 7 AM–7 PM.

deals.deal: Any Pizza $9.99 — Parmesan Stuffed Crust Included
deals.desc: Order any pizza with any crust and any toppings for $9.99, with Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge through July 26, 2026.

deals.deal: $7 Big Deal Meal + America $2.50 Menu (through July 12)
deals.desc: Grab a Cheeseburger, Chicken Bites, medium drink, and tots/fries for $7; plus a limited-time $2.50 menu with select items available through July 12 via app or drive-in.

deals.deal: Eagle Cup: Free Beverage + Daily $3 Refresher Code (through July 31)
deals.desc: Purchase the limited-edition $10.99 Eagle Cup and receive a free medium beverage instantly, plus a unique code for a $3 medium Refresher or Zero drink once per day through July 31.
deals.expires: While supplies last / codes through July 31

deals.deal: Dunkin' Rewards: Free Food & Drinks from 150 Points
deals.desc: Earn 10 points per $1 spent in-store or in the app; redeem for free food and drinks starting at just 150 points across 8 reward tiers.

deals.deal: BOGO Sandwich/Salad/Soup — $5 for Second Item (code BOGO5)
deals.desc: Buy one whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, or soup and get another for just $5 using promo code BOGO5 at checkout.

deals.deal: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu — Up to 40% Off
deals.desc: Choose up to 10 half-portion items including soups, sandwiches, and salads for just $4.99 each, saving around 40% off regular prices.

deals.deal: Free Mod Mondays — Free Drink Customization
deals.desc: Starbucks Rewards members get one free drink modification (cold foam, extra espresso shot, syrup, etc.) once a month on a designated Monday announced in the app.

deals.deal: $7.99 Carryout Special — Any 1-Topping Pizza or Wings
deals.desc: Get any 1-topping carryout pizza (excludes XL), 8-piece wings, or boneless chicken for just $7.99 this week at participating locations.

deals.deal: $6 Big Box — Chicken + Sides Meal Deal
deals.desc: The classic Popeyes $6 Big Box is back, delivering a complete chicken meal with sides at participating locations via app or in-store.

deals.deal: $1.99 Sliders — Any Slider, Limited Time
deals.desc: Get any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time, great for mixing and matching flavors.

deals.deal: Whopper Wednesdays — Discounted Whopper
deals.desc: Every Wednesday, Burger King offers a discounted Whopper through the app at participating locations; price varies by market.

deals.deal: Half-Price Cheeseburgers Every Tuesday After 5 PM (App)
deals.desc: Order through the Sonic app after 5 PM on Tuesdays to get single-patty cheeseburgers at half price at participating drive-ins.

deals.deal: Half-Price Drinks & Slushes All Day in App
deals.desc: Sonic app users enjoy 50% off drinks and slushes all day when ordering through the mobile app at participating locations.

deals.deal: McValue: Buy One, Add One for $1
deals.desc: Buy any full-price McValue menu item and add a second eligible item for just $1—covers breakfast, lunch, and dinner items in the app.

deals.deal: Taco Bell Snack Tacos: 3 for $2.49 on Tuesdays
deals.desc: Every Tuesday from 3–11 PM, grab three Snack Tacos for just $2.49 at participating Taco Bell locations.

deals.deal: 3 Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3.59 on Thursdays
deals.desc: Every Thursday from 3–11 PM, get three Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3.59 at participating Taco Bell locations.

deals.deal: Biggie Deals: $4 Biggie Bites / $6 Biggie Bag / $8 Biggie Bundle
deals.desc: Wendy's tiered value menu offers Biggie Bites for $4, a Biggie Bag for $6, and a full Biggie Bundle for $8 via the app.

deals.deal: Wok Wednesday: Spin-to-Win Free Food (App Game)
deals.desc: Every Wednesday, Panda Rewards members can play the Wok Wednesday game in the app for a chance to win a free food or drink reward, redeemable same day.
